markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the content review process and align on upcoming content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New PR Workflow Approved:** A new GitHub PR workflow is approved, enabling publication of 11 backlogged and 5 new articles. The process prioritizes specific feedback over manual rewrites to train GrowthX and improve content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**New CTA Strategy:** The team will add a middle-funnel, ungated CTA (e.g., an MDM handbook) to articles to capture leads earlier in the buyer journey, supplementing the current bottom-funnel options.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [**Competitor Content Paused:** All competitor comparison topics are paused until Ashish is consulted to ensure alignment with existing battle cards and avoid creating conflicting content.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [**Website Traffic Anomaly:** An unexplained surge in direct traffic is distorting analytics, making data unreliable. The cause remains unknown after initial investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Publication Process

  - [A new GitHub PR workflow is approved, enabling publication of 11 backlogged and 5 new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Training Session:** John will schedule a session for \~15 reviewers to formalize the process.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Goal:** Ensure reviewers provide specific feedback for GrowthX to implement, rather than performing manual rewrites.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This trains GrowthX and refines the Atlas model, improving content quality and reducing future review time.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**PR Labeling:** GrowthX will tag John, Irena, and Brock on draft PRs until Suleman has direct labeling access.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Content Strategy: CTAs & Imagery

  - [**Call-to-Action (CTA) Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Problem:** Current CTAs ("Get a Demo," "Contact Us") are all bottom-funnel, missing opportunities to capture leads earlier.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add a middle-funnel, ungated CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
          - [**Example:** A free MDM handbook.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Provides value and captures interest without requiring a form submission.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [**Future:** Link CTAs directly to article topics.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [**Imagery Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Problem:** Mike T. flagged current article images as low quality.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Solution:** Remove existing images. Mike T. will create a set of 10–12 generic, high-quality images to be cycled through.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The primary purpose of images is for social sharing; the low probability of a single user seeing the same image repeatedly makes this approach viable.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### Competitor Comparisons

  - [**Action:** All competitor comparison topics are paused.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To ensure content aligns with existing battle cards and avoid creating conflicting information.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Erik will connect with Ashish, who is already working on comparison data, to align on the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### Website Performance & SEO

  - [**Client-Side Rendering (CSR):**](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [**Finding:** The CSR issue flagged in a recent audit is not a problem.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [**Evidence:** LLMs are successfully reading and training on recent articles, proving the content is crawlable.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**Website Traffic Anomaly:**](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [**Problem:** Analytics show an unusually high volume of direct traffic, distorting data and making it unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**Status:** The cause is unknown after investigation by both teams.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**John:** Schedule the content review training session for \~15 reviewers.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**John:** Develop a middle-funnel, ungated CTA for articles.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [**Erik:** Connect with Ashish to align on the competitor comparison strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [**Erik:** Continue investigating the website's direct traffic anomaly.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [**All:** Reschedule the weekly sync to Tuesday, December 23rd, at the same time.](https://fathom.video/share/mqztnMn-ghd4SPFb_UWt_KmPsYSVzw8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
